events.value: Need date night plans? Or just a fun hang with friends? Misconduct Comedy has got you covered with Philly's best comedians in a cozy venue. Experience Philadelphia's best stand-up comedy showcase featuring talented local comedians and rising stars. An unforgettable night of laughs in the heart of Center City. 21+ only.
